synopsis: The "new" Star Wars Tales continues! The vastness of the Star Wars galaxy hosts an ever-unfolding mythology, filled with character-driven stories of loss and tragedy, of heroism and redemption. This issue contributes three more such tales to the mythos-the tragic saga of mysterious Jedi Darca Nyl continues to unravel, courtesy of Cla$$war writer Rob Williams and Star Wars: Empire artist Brandon Badeaux; Two enemy soldiers accidentally left behind after Return of the Jedi's Battle of Endor must survive a tribe of disgruntled Ewoks and each other in "Marooned" by Lucas Marangon; and we kick off the issue with a tie-in to the highly anticipated LucasArts video game Republic Commando. Sophisticated yet easily accessible-it's Star Wars comics at their best! • Covers by Lee Bermejo (Batman/Deathblow; Batman: Gotham Knights) • New-reader friendly-each story is self-contained and easily accessible. Available worldwide from Dark Horse Comics (available in the UK from Titan)
title: Star Wars Tales #22
